hypothesis: Combining Aroon Up/Down crossovers with Volume Oscillator and Fibonacci retracement levels aims to capture momentum shifts validated by volume and key price levels, improving signal accuracy and reducing whipsaws.
Combining Aroon Up/Down crossovers with Volume Oscillator confirms momentum shifts, while Fibonacci levels provide potential price targets, improving signal accuracy and reducing whipsaws.

Combining Aroon Up/Down crossovers with Volume Oscillator momentum shifts and Fibonacci retracement levels aims to identify high-probability reversals in trending markets, while the adaptive ATR-based risk management adjusts stop-loss and take-profit levels based on market volatility.
